title: fragariastrum apenninum
intro: Fragariastrum apenninum, also known as Strawberry Tree, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Ericaceae. Its medicinal properties include its potential to be used as an antiseptic and astringent, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits associated with Fragariastrum apenninum include its potential to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
